title: Presentations & Demos
shortSummary: Learn to deliver demos that sell, not just show. Structure presentations around buyer outcomes, guide technical validation, and handle curveballs with confidence.
whyItMatters: A demo is not a product tour. The worst demos walk through every feature in order. The best demos show the buyer their future: how their specific problems get solved, in their context, with measurable outcomes. In technical SaaS sales, demos also build trust with evaluators and give your sales engineer a stage to reinforce credibility. Mastering the demo is what turns qualified opportunities into proposals and proposals into closed deals.
coreConcepts: Using persuasion structures without sounding scripted
Handling technical questions you don't know the answer to
Partnering with sales engineers on technical validation
Demo environment preparation and fallback plans
Follow-up: turning demo momentum into next steps
